columns.expression: SUM(CASE WHEN `Churn` = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(`*`)
CASE WHEN `tenure` <= 12 THEN '0-12 mo' WHEN `tenure` <= 24 THEN '13-24 mo' WHEN `tenure` <= 48 THEN '25-48 mo' ELSE '49-72 mo' END

datasets.name: services_unpivot
queryLines:
SELECT
  customerID,
  Churn,
  InternetService,
  Contract,
  tenure,
  MonthlyCharges,
  Service,
  Status
FROM
  dennis_schultz_azure_classic01.`00_shared`.telco_churn
    UNPIVOT (
      Status FOR Service IN (
        OnlineSecurity,
        OnlineBackup,
        DeviceProtection,
        TechSupport,
        StreamingTV,
        StreamingMovies,
        MultipleLines
      )

columns.expression: CASE WHEN `Service` = 'OnlineSecurity' THEN 'Online Security' WHEN `Service` = 'OnlineBackup' THEN 'Online Backup' WHEN `Service` = 'DeviceProtection' THEN 'Device Protection' WHEN `Service` = 'TechSupport' THEN 'Tech Support' WHEN `Service` = 'StreamingTV' THEN 'Streaming TV' WHEN `Service` = 'StreamingMovies' THEN 'Streaming Movies' WHEN `Service` = 'MultipleLines' THEN 'Multiple Lines' ELSE `Service` END

columns.description: Groups services into Protection, Entertainment, Communication
columns.expression: CASE WHEN `Service` IN ('OnlineSecurity', 'OnlineBackup', 'DeviceProtection', 'TechSupport') THEN 'Protection' WHEN `Service` IN ('StreamingTV', 'StreamingMovies') THEN 'Entertainment' ELSE 'Communication' END
SUM(CASE WHEN `Churn` = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(`*`)

datasets.name: services_summary
queryLines:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN Service = 'OnlineSecurity' THEN 'Online Security'
    WHEN Service = 'OnlineBackup' THEN 'Online Backup'
    WHEN Service = 'DeviceProtection' THEN 'Device Protection'
    WHEN Service = 'TechSupport' THEN 'Tech Support'
    WHEN Service = 'StreamingTV' THEN 'Streaming TV'
    WHEN Service = 'StreamingMovies' THEN 'Streaming Movies'
    WHEN Service = 'MultipleLines' THEN 'Multiple Lines'
    ELSE Service
  END AS ServiceName,
  Status,
  COUNT(*) AS Customers,
  ROUND(
    SUM(
      CASE
        WHEN Churn = 'Yes' THEN 1
        ELSE 0
      END
    )
      * 100.0
      / COUNT(*),
    1
  ) AS ChurnRatePct
FROM
  dennis_schultz_azure_classic01.`00_shared`.telco_churn
    UNPIVOT (
      Status FOR Service IN (
        OnlineSecurity,
        OnlineBackup,
        DeviceProtection,
        TechSupport,
        StreamingTV,
        StreamingMovies,
        MultipleLines
      )
    )
GROUP BY
  Service,
  Status
ORDER BY
  Service,
  Status

lines: Interactive analysis of customer churn drivers across contract types, services, billing, and demographics.
How gender, age, partner status, and dependents relate to customer churn.
How add-on service subscriptions — protection, streaming, and communication — correlate with customer churn.

filters.expression: `Status` NOT IN ('No internet service', 'No phone service')
`Status` NOT IN ('No internet service', 'No phone service')
